_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Score has moved ±2+ points in 0 of 37 windows—this is a coil with no visible breaker, so HOLD with conviction is the skilled call until Fear/Greed breaks 40 or VIX spikes above 75.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial split—both see bottoming structure but analyst forward-calls HOLD while narrative implies accumulation/UP; judge sides with analyst's HOLD given the 0% directional hit rate and trust weight advantage
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed breaks above 40 with btc_momentum_30d holding above 50 and funding flipping positive
next_move.invalidated_if: vix spikes above 75 with dxy breaking 102 and etf_flows collapsing below 70
